import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_process_batch_all_items_processed():
    """Test that process_batch processes all items, not skipping the last one."""
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    results = source.process_batch(items)
    # The output should have the same length as the input
    assert len(results) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} items, got {len(results)}"
    # Verify the correct values (each item multiplied by 2)
    assert results == [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
